title: TrustForge Proof Bundle
description: JSON representation of a .tfproof bundle (TF-0005). Binary framing is defined in Phase 2.

bundle_version.description: Version of the proof-bundle schema itself.

events.description: Proof events carried by this bundle, in their hash-chain order.

merkle_root.description: Merkle root over the events, if computed.

chain_hash.description: Hash over the event sequence as a linear hash-chain.

transparency_anchor.description: Anchoring metadata if this bundle was submitted to a transparency log.

inclusion_proof.description: Opaque inclusion-proof blob returned by the backend.

signature.description: Signature envelope over the canonical form of this bundle (not verified in the foundation phase).
